chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَقْتُلُ مَمْلُوكَهُ أَوْ يُنَكِّلُ بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – The man kills his slave, or tortures him

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ قَتَلَ مَمْلُوكاً لَهُ قَالَ يُعْتِقُ رَقَبَةً وَ يَصُومُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ وَ يَتُوبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ .
عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ يُونُسَ عَنْ زُرْعَةَ عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ مِثْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who kills a slave of his. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He emancipates a neck, and Fasts for two months consecutively, and repents to Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Zurara, from Sama’at - similar to it’.
